Uses of Class
com.nib.supernaut.Task

Packages that use Task
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.observability
Observability and monitoring interface for Supernaut.

  • Uses of Task in com.nib.supernaut

    Methods in com.nib.supernaut that return Task
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Task
    Task.channel(Channel channel)
    Assigns a channel to the task
    Task
    Task.data(byte[] data, int datalen)
    Assigns the task data and its length for the task.
    Task
    SupernautRegion.newTask(StartCode startCode, ITerminalHandler terminal, PctEntry pct)
    Creates and registers a new task in the system if the region is available.
    Task
    Task.payload(Object payload)
    Assigns a payload for the task.
    Task
    Task.qname(String qname)
    Assigns the start queue name for the task.
    Task
    Task.servlet(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest request, jakarta.servlet.ServletResponse response)
    Assigns the servlet handling the task.
    Task
    Task.timeout(int secs)
    Sets the timeout for the task execution.
    Task
    Task.user(User user)
    Assigns a user to the task.
